name: StreamNative Extensions — Example
description: Reference sample repository. Four live extensions (Nimegami, Donghub, Animexin, Kuronime) ported from HatsuneMikuUwU/cloudstream-extensions-uwu — includes an AES-CBC crypto challenge (Kuronime) and demonstrates HLS / direct-MP4 / iframe playback formats.

extensions.name: Animexin
extensions.description: Anime + donghua subtitle Indonesia. Ported from cloudstream-extensions-uwu.
extensions.author: hexated (original), 0xshitcode (port)

extensions.name: ClearKey DRM Test
extensions.description: Reference test manifests protected with W3C ClearKey. Verifies StreamNative's DRM pipeline (dash.js + browser-native EME). Not a real content provider.
extensions.author: 0xshitcode

extensions.name: DASH & Subtitles Test
extensions.description: Reference test streams (MPEG-DASH manifests + WebVTT subtitle tracks). Verifies dash.js + <track> pipeline against public DASH-IF and Google Shaka assets. Not a real content provider.
extensions.author: 0xshitcode

extensions.name: Donghub
extensions.description: Donghua subtitle Indonesia. Ported from cloudstream-extensions-uwu (via Dailymotion).
extensions.author: hexated (original), 0xshitcode (port)

extensions.name: Kuronime
extensions.description: Anime subtitle Indonesia. Ported from cloudstream-extensions-uwu — includes AES-CBC key-derivation for the encrypted API response.
extensions.author: hexated (original), 0xshitcode (port)

extensions.name: Nimegami
extensions.description: Anime subtitle Indonesia. Ported from cloudstream-extensions-uwu.
extensions.author: hexated (original), 0xshitcode (port)
